title: A Season of togetherness at The Living Cornerstone
description: SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Living Cornerstone in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Living Cornerstone in Sedgefield recently hosted its much-anticipated annual Christmas Lunch, bringing together residents, their families, staff, and special guests for a joyful celebration of the festive season.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Living Cornerstone in Sedgefield recently hosted its much-anticipated annual Christmas Lunch, bringing together residents, their families, staff, and special guests for a joyful celebration of the festive season."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event marked by warmth, gratitude, and a strong sense of community took place at the estalishment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On arrival, guests were welcomed with a refreshing welcome drink before being shown to their seats at tables beautifully decorated to reflect the joy and togetherness of Christmas shared as a family.","html":"On arrival, guests were welcomed with a refreshing welcome drink before being shown to their seats at tables beautifully decorated to reflect the joy and togetherness of Christmas shared as a family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Musical entertainment added to the festive atmosphere, with the group Sing4 delighting guests with their uplifting performance.","html":"Musical entertainment added to the festive atmosphere, with the group Sing4 delighting guests with their uplifting performance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A special highlight of the afternoon was when Jean-Marie, who leads the kitchen at The Living Cornerstone, joined the group in song, drawing smiles and applause from residents and guests alike.","html":"A special highlight of the afternoon was when Jean-Marie, who leads the kitchen at The Living Cornerstone, joined the group in song, drawing smiles and applause from residents and guests alike."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The proceedings were officially opened by Facility Manager, Marietjie Digue, who warmly welcomed everyone in attendance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She thanked the families for making the effort to be part of this special occasion, emphasising the importance of shared moments and continued connection between residents and their loved ones.","html":"She thanked the families for making the effort to be part of this special occasion, emphasising the importance of shared moments and continued connection between residents and their loved ones."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Digue also expressed her sincere appreciation to the staff of The Living Cornerstone for their dedication and extra commitment in ensuring the event was a resounding success.","html":"Digue also expressed her sincere appreciation to the staff of The Living Cornerstone for their dedication and extra commitment in ensuring the event was a resounding success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Special words of gratitude were extended to Sing4 for their musical contribution and to Eden Stretch Tents for their support on the day.","html":"Special words of gratitude were extended to Sing4 for their musical contribution and to Eden Stretch Tents for their support on the day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Digue concluded her address by reflecting on the highlights of 2025, acknowledging the milestones achieved and the collective effort that made the year a meaningful and successful one."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents and their families were treated to a festive lunch prepared by The Living Cornerstone’s kitchen team. The carefully planned menu, described by many as fitting for a five-star establishment, was enjoyed by all and added to the overall sense of celebration.","html":"Residents and their families were treated to a festive lunch prepared by The Living Cornerstone’s kitchen team. The carefully planned menu, described by many as fitting for a five-star establishment, was enjoyed by all and added to the overall sense of celebration."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the year draws to a close, The Living Cornerstone reflects with overwhelming gratitude on a year filled with abundant blessings.","html":"As the year draws to a close, The Living Cornerstone reflects with overwhelming gratitude on a year filled with abundant blessings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Christmas Lunch once again served as a reminder of the strong bonds, compassion, and community spirit that define life at the facility, making it a truly special place for residents and their families.","html":"The Christmas Lunch once again served as a reminder of the strong bonds, compassion, and community spirit that define life at the facility, making it a truly special place for residents and their families."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents together with their families recently enjoyed a special Christmas Lunch at the Living Cornerstone in Sedgefield.","html":"Residents together with their families recently enjoyed a special Christmas Lunch at the Living Cornerstone in Sedgefield. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kitchen staff of the Living Cornestone.","html":"Kitchen staff of the Living Cornestone."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
